title: Architecture ownership at zeit ag
summary: Technical ownership for web, SaaS, and on-premise architecture in an established business product.
details: Drives architecture decisions and implementation direction
Still works hands-on across frontend, backend, and infrastructure

title: Fat-client to web migration
summary: Moved core time tracking, project management, and workforce planning functionality into a modern web platform.
details: Reduced reliance on Windows fat clients
Enabled both SaaS and on-premise operating models

title: Swiss Post WebStamp
summary: Redesign, refactoring, and maintenance of a production webshop for Swiss Post.
details: Worked on a widely used customer-facing product
Handled product evolution in a long-lived production system

title: Mobile and accessibility-focused customs flow
summary: Delivered and maintained a customs declaration workflow embedded into Swiss Post processes with strong mobile and accessibility requirements.
details: Had to fit into an existing operational flow
Accessibility and mobile usage were core product constraints

title: Modular event commerce platform
summary: Built and evolved a highly modular reservation and sales platform for events of many kinds.
details: Production workloads running on AWS EC2

title: Mobile entry and POS app
summary: Delivered a mobile admissions application with integrated point-of-sale functionality.
details: Used device features such as camera, GPS, and NFC
